title: Foo Bar Event Sourcing Replay
description: Fix a broken event-sourcing setup: event log in Redpanda is out of sync with materialized view in Postgres. Replay events to restore consistency.

tasks.description: Replay events from Redpanda to rebuild materialized state in Postgres

infrastructure.description: Redpanda with order_events topic. Postgres app.order_snapshots table out of sync (missing events, wrong totals).
